titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 7: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 7. (A.R. No. 251 of 1894.) TIRUVAIYYĀṞU, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Pañchanandēśvara temple.
This inscription on grounds of palaeography and internal evidence may be assigned to Āditya I.

It records that Kaḍamba Viḍari, a resident of Kāviri-maṅgalam in Kuṟukkaināḍu, the foster-mother (tādi) of Kaṉṉaradēva donated twenty kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mahādēva at Tiruvaiyyāṟu with an uḻakku and a piḍi of oil by the measure Tiruvaiyyāṟaṉ. With this gold six mā and one kāṇi of land was obtained after reclamation, for the above purpose.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. V. No. 550.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājakeśaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu nāḷ nūṟṟumuppattu muṉṟu
tiruvaiyāṟṟu mahādevarkkuk kaṉṉaradevar tātiyāyiṉa kuṟukkai nāṭṭu kāvirimaṅkalattu
k kaṭampa(pa)viṭari candrātittavaṟ tiruvaiyāṟaṉā(l) luḻakkey Orupiṭi Arai neyyā(l) lo
ru nandāviḷakkerippataṟkku kuṭutta poṉ Irupatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉṉāl mayakkik kuṭu
tta nilattukkellai Aḻaci kāṭṭaṭikaḷ viḷakkuc ceykku vaṭakiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
ḻaiyāṟṟu kuṭivāykkālukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai naṉtavana
māṉa pūṉtoṭṭattukku mekkum teṉpāṟkkellai Ārkkāṭuk kiḻār mayakkiva
ṭṭannil vaṭakkum Ivicaitta peru nāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Āṟu mākkāṇi .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
